headline: 2 Reasons to Like EXPE (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Expedia currently trades at $228.13 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a middling return of 4.8%. However, the stock is beating the S&P 500’s 2.8% decline during that period.

headline: Strength Seen in Target Hospitality (TH): Can Its 36.4% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: Target Hospitality (TH) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
